title: Socio-economic effects of malaria on the living conditions of households in the health district of Karisimbi
author: FATAKI Serge
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study addresses the "socio-economic effects of malaria on the living conditions of households in the health district of Karisimbi". The research combined both quantitative and qualitative methods in order to have good results. To calculate the size of sample, we used the CHECKMARKET method; we had 384 heads of households to interview.
steps_raw: This study addresses the "socio-economic effects of malaria on the living conditions of households in the health district of Karisimbi". The research combined both quantitative and qualitative methods in order to have good results. To calculate the size of sample, we used the CHECKMARKET method; we had 384 heads of households to interview.
keywords: Socio-economic, Malaria, Households, Health, District, Karisimbi, Goma
